nasb.text: As for the outer wall by the side of the chambers, toward the outer court facing the chambers, its length was fifty cubits.

esv.text: And there was a wall outside parallel to the chambers, toward the outer court, opposite the chambers, fifty cubits long.

cnv.text: 在外面有一道牆，在房子的前面，與房子和外院平行，長二十五公尺。

ccb.text: 厢房旁边的外墙与厢房及外院平行，长二十五米。
